$comment: Concrete datalink tooling config for sqlink (SQLite -> wasm, sqlite:extension components, static describe() manifest ABI). Filled from ~/git/sqlink/tooling/*.py. To consume in-repo, drop this at sqlink/tooling/datalink.config.json (with repo_root removed so it auto-discovers) and depend on datalink/tooling.

identity.$comment: sqlink's real values, for the identity engine's GENERALITY proof. sqlink's WIT package is sqlink:wasm@0.1.0 (major 0); wit_source_dir is the flat wit/ dir (top-level *.wit; wit/deps/ excluded by the non-recursive glob). NOTE: sqlink currently records `checksum` (an OCI artifact checksum, e.g. 'sha256:builtin'), NOT content_digest. Pointing sqlink's checksum at this shared content_digest scheme (+ the @0.1.0 -> @1.0.0 contract decision) is the DEFERRED per-repo consume, not this lift -- this config only proves the engine GENERATES the right witcanon + content digests for sqlink.

type_map.$comment: DEFERRED (Tier 2): SQLite's five fixed storage classes (NULL, INTEGER, REAL, TEXT, BLOB). Recorded here as the placeholder where ValueModel-aware tooling will branch; the current Tier-1 engine does not consume it.
